sunWedSat.firstLine: The earth is the Lord’s for he made it:
sunWedSat.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

monThu.firstLine: Worship the Lord in the beauty of holiness:
monThu.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

tueFri.firstLine: The mercy of the Lord is everlasting:
tueFri.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

advent.firstLine: Our King and Savior now draws near:
advent.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

christmasBeforeEpiphany.firstLine: Alleluia, to us a child is born:
christmasBeforeEpiphany.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

christmasAfterEpiphany.firstLine: The Lord has shown forth his glory:
christmasAfterEpiphany.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

lentAndTriduum.firstLine: The Lord is full of compassion and mercy:
lentAndTriduum.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

easter.firstLine: Alleluia. The Lord is risen indeed:
easter.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

presentationOfTheLord.firstLine: The Word was made flesh and dwelt among us:
presentationOfTheLord.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

annunciation.firstLine: The Word was made flesh and dwelt among us:
annunciation.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

pentecostSunday.firstLine: Alleluia. The Spirit of the Lord renews the face of the earth:
pentecostSunday.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

trinitySunday.firstLine: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit, one God:
trinitySunday.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

ascension.firstLine: Alleluia. Christ the Lord has ascended into heaven:
ascension.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

transfiguration.firstLine: The Lord has shown forth his glory:
transfiguration.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

allSaints.firstLine: The Lord is glorious in his saints:
allSaints.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

josephHusbandOfMary.firstLine: The Lord is glorious in his saints:
josephHusbandOfMary.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

peterAndPaulApostles.firstLine: The Lord is glorious in his saints:
peterAndPaulApostles.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

assumption.firstLine: The Lord is glorious in his saints:
assumption.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

immaculateConception.firstLine: The Lord is glorious in his saints:
immaculateConception.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

birthOfJohnTheBaptist.firstLine: The Lord is glorious in his saints:
birthOfJohnTheBaptist.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

corpusChristi.firstLine: The Lord is glorious in his saints:
corpusChristi.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

sacredHeartOfJesus.firstLine: The Lord is glorious in his saints:
sacredHeartOfJesus.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.

christTheKing.firstLine: The Lord is glorious in his saints:
christTheKing.secondLine: O come, let us adore him.
